View your history in a timeline format that shows time spent. Search through website contents as well as title and URL.

The only history manager that makes life easier, not harder.

______________________________________________

Tired of spending hours scrolling through Chrome history trying to find that one website you browsed two weeks ago? Getting frustrated sorting through endless irrelevant websites and irrelevant pop-up sites just to find that one article you viewed roughly two weeks ago? 

Introducing TimeTrace — your personalized database designed to help you navigate your browsing history like never before.

TimeTrace is a web extension that presents all of your browser history as an intuitive and informative timeline. Our extension not only allows you to see exactly how much time you’ve spent on each website and better understand your browsing habits, but it also allows you to search for the content of any site you've browsed. 

______________________________________________

Features include:
- A powerful search bar that allows you to search browsed website content in addition to site title and URL.
- A continuous timeline that shows all browser activity and time spent on each website.
- Timeline automatically folds URLs from the same domain together, with the option of hiding irrelevant browsing activity (hide sites visited for less than 5s).
- Easily go to any day that has browsing history and view your timeline.

______________________________________________

Upcoming features:

We are currently working on automatic AI summaries for timeline events.

In the near future, we will be offering an AI co-pilot that helps you find any content on any website you’ve ever browsed using TimeTrace.

______________________________________________

Data privacy:

TimeTrace does not store any user personal information. All user data are stored locally. For more information, please view our privacy policy: https://docs.google.com/document/d/12rHAdt82dFMD0kItUu2Y1aHOkg0b7LzJzEfgLlY5SIo/edit?usp=sharing

______________________________________________

Love TimeTrace? Join our discord community!
https://discord.gg/fEtJCzYQ5M

This extension provides access to a bookmarks menu.

How to use:

- Click with the left mouse button to open a bookmark in the current tab.
- Use the middle mouse button or the left mouse button while holding down the Ctrl key to open a bookmark in a new tab.
- To instantly switch to a newly opened tab with a bookmark, press the middle mouse button while holding down the Shift key.
- Press the left mouse button with the Shift key held down to launch a bookmark in a new window.
- Click the middle button on a folder to open all its bookmarks in separate tabs.
- Right-click to bring up the context menu.

In the settings panel, you can choose to conceal certain bookmarks or folders, which is particularly handy if you're syncing bookmarks across various computers.
Torq AI: ChatGPT Powered AI Assistant
Harnessing the prowess of ChatGPT to revolutionize your productivity through advanced AI assistance.

Introducing Torq AI, your advanced browsing assistant powered by state-of-the-art AI capabilities. This innovative Chrome Extension is built to elevate your browsing experience, bolster productivity, and offer a suite of new features including our brand new "Sidebar". No matter the browsing context, be it engaging with your Gmail or needing smarter, AI-integrated responses, Torq AI is your solution to streamline workflow.

With Torq AI, you don't just have instant access to the data you need; you have an intelligent assistant enhancing your browsing experience at every step. From generating smart responses to assisting with real-time Gmail suggestions, Torq AI is your go-to for effective and engaging web navigation.

⭐️ Key Features ⭐️

1️⃣ AI Smart Reply and Response Generation

- Engage in dynamic conversations about any topic on the web with your personal AI assistant, Torq AI.
- Benefit from smart response generation, quick answer provision, and simplification of complex texts you're reading.

- How to use it? ⬇️
- Interact with Torq AI by selecting text and clicking on the Torq AI icon for inquiries about your selected reading.

2️⃣ Gmail Smart Reply Feature

- Smoothly navigate your Gmail communications with the aid of Torq AI's Smart Reply feature, offering real-time suggestions for responses.

3️⃣ Efficient Data Access

- Leverage Torq AI for quick access to essential information, thus streamlining your workflow and saving precious time.

4️⃣ Seamless Browsing Experience

- Experience a highly responsive and stable user interface, guaranteeing smoother transitions and superior usability.

5️⃣ Newly Introduced Sidebar

- Engage in an interactive AI chat, manage bookmarks and folders, access quick links, and customise the sidebar according to your needs.

Torq AI is FREE and does not require any CREDIT CARD.

🧑‍🏫 Introduction to Torq AI: 

Torq AI is here to transform your browsing experience. With our cutting-edge AI technology, you can generate smart responses, receive real-time Gmail suggestions, and have immediate access to required data. Torq AI offers you a seamless, efficient browsing journey, saving time and making web navigation intuitive and easy.

Experience the power of an AI assistant that enhances your browsing experience wherever you go. Simply install the Torq AI Chrome Extension and click on the Torq AI icon on the right side of the browser to start a smart and efficient interaction with the AI.

➕ What is Torq AI?

Torq AI is an intelligent browsing assistant empowered with advanced AI technology. It's designed to facilitate smart responses to inquiries, improve Gmail communications, and offer an efficient web navigation experience. Torq AI is here to boost your productivity by offering an enhanced browsing experience.

➕ How to utilise Sidebar in Torq AI?

Access Torq AI's Side Bar by using the Alt + T shortcut, and utilise the AI chat with the Alt + C shortcut or the trigger on the right of the page for a seamlessly interactive and customisable browsing experience.

➕ How do I utilise AI and Torq AI in Chrome?

To use Torq AI on Chrome, install the Torq AI Chrome extension from the Chrome Web Store. After installation, you can start interacting with Torq AI on any website, enjoying smart AI responses and improved Gmail communication.

➕ Subscribe to us for more!

https://www.torq.live

Stay updated with Torq AI, your advanced Chrome Extension for an engaging browsing experience. Enjoy the power of AI in your browsing journey with Torq AI!

Chrome extension for fee-based transaction prioritization on Cardano, ensuring fairness.

This Chrome extension is designed for users of the Cardano blockchain network, providing them with a powerful tool to prioritize transactions with high fees, ensuring prompt and efficient processing. By internally optimizing transaction parameters, such as fees, the extension aims to accelerate confirmation times on the Cardano blockchain. It achieves this by analyzing transaction data and dynamically adjusting fee structures and execution units increasing the likelihood of transactions being promptly mined and added to blocks. 
The primary function of the wallet lies in its role as an intermediary between transactions processed through a Cardano decentralized application (DApp) and the user's Cardano wallet. Typically, these transactions are executed with fixed execution-units, leading to higher costs in cases where a smaller execution unit will suffice. However, the intercepted transaction undergoes thorough analysis, with a focus on optimizing its execution units. In terms of fees, a slight increment is applied to enhance the likelihood of miners on the Cardano blockchain prioritizing its mining. This is achieved by adding an extra output based on the selected network and balancing the transaction. Traditionally, transactions with higher fees tend to be larger in scale. Nonetheless, by utilizing this priority wallet, even smaller transactions can feature fees substantial enough to garner faster attention from miners. It's important to note that this wallet doesn't involve a seed phrase for generating public and private keys; rather, it functions as a means to expedite the confirmation process of user transactions within the Cardano blockchain.
Additionally, the extension enhances usability and user experience by fetching and displaying the wallets they have installed in their browser, allowing for swift wallet selection. Favicon of the visited website is displayed when activated. This visual indicator helps users confirm their selection of the preferred wallet from the intended website, making the process more intuitive and visually recognizable. 
The extension supports six popular Cardano wallet extensions: Nami, Eternl, Flint, Yoroi, Typhon, and Lace. Users can choose their preferred wallet extension for executing transactions. Additionally, the extension is compatible with the Cardano mainnet and two testnets (preprod and preview), with these selections stored in the user's main browser's localStorage.
Based on the user's choices, the extension can generate an updated and balanced transaction specific to the selected wallet and network. If the user selects a Cardano wallet extension that is not installed in their browser or if there is a network mismatch between the priority wallet extension and the selected cardano wallet extension, an error will be thrown indicating the reason for the issue.
To optimize the transaction, the extension makes three specific API calls. Firstly, it adds an extra payment to the original transaction and balances it. Then, it calls the first API to determine the exact fee required for the transaction. If the transaction includes execution unit fields (which indicate the CPU and memory usage required for execution), the extension makes a second API call to calculate the updated execution units after adding the extra payment. Finally, it balances the new transaction with the updated fee and execution units, and the third API call is made to submit the transaction.
This browser extension is suitable for both casual users and developers engaged in creating Cardano-based decentralized applications. For developers, it streamlines the process of conducting on-chain tests for smart contracts, facilitating faster iterations and debugging. Meanwhile, general users can take advantage of quicker transaction confirmations in various scenarios such as blockchain auctions or NFT purchases, enhancing their overall experience with Cardano-based applications.

Unlike traditional bookmarks, this extension offers a streamlined, mouse-free solution for accessing your favorite websites. With Swift Search, you can quickly access your saved sites from any web page using a keyboard shortcut.
Retrospective History indexes and allows you to search the full text content of your web history. Never lose track of a page again.

Search the full text of everything you've read online - right from Chrome

Have you ever had trouble recalling where on the internet you found an article, blog post, recipe, or snippet of text that you remember reading? Chrome’s default History stores the title and URL of the websites you visit, ignoring all of the page’s content.  If you can’t remember the page title or URL, you’re out of luck.  Retrospective History indexes the full text contents of the pages you read, creating a personal, private, and local search engine to make your browsing history truly useful.

How It Works:

You can simply browse the web as usual, and Retrospective History will work in the background to automatically index the text content of the pages you visit. A red/green indicator on the toolbar icon shows whether the page you're currently viewing has been indexed. Be sure to pin the extension's icon to your Chrome toolbar so you can easily view this status indicator.  

If you want to delete the page that you're currently viewing from the index or add its domain to your ignore list, you can easily do so from the extension's toolbar popup window.

When you need to find something you've read before, select "Search History" from the toolbar popup to open the search page. Enter your query to find matching results from your browsing history. Unlike Chrome's basic History which only shows page titles and URLs, this extension lets you search the full-text content of the pages you've visited.

Please note that Retrospective History does not index certain single page applications and "infinite scroll" style pages. Most social media sites fall in this category. The toolbar icon will indicate whether or not these pages have been indexed.

Key Features:

🔍 Powerful Full-Text Search
-Lightning-fast search across the full text of your browsing history
-Filter and sort results by the date you accessed each page
-View the context of your search term within each result
-Easily find pages you visited even when you can't remember their title or URL
🔒 Private
-All indexed data is stored locally on your computer
-No data is ever transmitted from your system
-Your browsing history remains your own
🦾 Flexible Configuration
-Define a retention period for your history to automatically delete old entries
-Add domains to a personal ignore list to prevent indexing pages you would rather not save
-Choose between a Light and Dark mode user interface
⚡ Optimized Performance
-Lightweight background indexing that won't slow down your browsing
-Efficient storage management with auto deletion options available to clear old entries
👤 User-Friendly Interface
-Clean, intuitive search interface
-Easily see if the page you're currently viewing has been indexed with a red/green indicator on the extension's toolbar icon
-Easy-to-use settings panel

Privacy First:

Your privacy is key. All indexed content stays on your computer - nothing is ever uploaded to the cloud or shared. You have complete control over what gets indexed and how long it's stored.

Perfect For:

-Researchers tracking sources
-Students organizing study materials
-Professionals managing technical documentation
-Anyone who wants to easily find content they've previously read


Privacy Policy: https://www.retrospectivehistory.com/privacy

Terms and Conditions: https://www.retrospectivehistory.com/terms

最近关闭标签页管理器
查看和恢复最近关闭的标签页

Recently Closed Tabs Recovery

最近关闭标签页恢复

Restore recently closed tabs with one click—supports both single and batch recovery, displays website icons and closing times, and shows up to 25 records.

一键恢复最近关闭的标签页，支持单个恢复或全部恢复，显示网站图标和关闭时间，最多展示 25 条记录。

Why do you need this extension?

为什么还需要这个扩展？

Browser history only shows "recently opened" tabs, not "recently closed," making searching inefficient.

历史记录展示的是“最近打开”而非“最近关闭”，查找低效。

The shortcut Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + T restores tabs one by one—you can't precisely choose which tab to reopen.

快捷键 Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + T 只能逐个撤回，无法精准指定。

The history panel (Ctrl + H) sorts by visit time, not closing time.

Ctrl + H 的历史面板按访问时间排，不按关闭时间。

Chrome’s native “Recently Closed” menu is limited (usually up to 8 items) and offers restricted interaction.

Chrome 原生“最近关闭”入口条目有限（常见最多约 8 条），交互也受限。

This extension clearly lists up to 25 recently closed tabs at once, supports both single selection and one-click batch restore. It’s perfect for scenarios like “accidentally closed a bunch of tabs” or “want to precisely recover a specific tab”—making tab recovery fast and efficient.

这个扩展一次性清晰列出最多 25 条，支持单选或一键全恢复，在“误关一堆标签”“想精确恢复某个标签”的场景下效率直接拉满。

🚀 Your browser's command center. Find anything, do everything, never leave the keyboard.

  • Smart commands: close duplicates, group tabs, clear history

Just a tab - Tab Manager & Duplicate Cleaner
All tabs in one page. One‑click duplicate cleanup. Save windows with tab groups. Page reminders.

See all your tabs at once, clean up duplicates safely, and save whole windows for later — now you can also save the current window directly from the extension popup. Smart default window names help you save faster, and you can delete saved windows anytime with a confirmation. Set page reminders with notes and get a New Tab prompt when it’s time.

Core features
- Tab Overview: see all tabs in one page, grouped by domain or Chrome tab group.
- Duplicate Cleanup: close duplicates in one click; hover highlights affected tabs before you act.
- Auto Duplicate Guard: if a URL is already open in the same window, switch to the existing tab instead of opening another one.
- Save & Reopen Windows: save the current window from the popup or New Tab page, with a smart suggested name (based on tab groups or top sites), preview its pages, reopen later with original tab groups and pinned tabs preserved. Delete saved windows with a confirmation when you no longer need them.
- Page Reminders (New): set a reminder for any page with optional notes; when it’s due, your New Tab shows a non-blocking prompt so you can open it or remind later.

Extras
- Settings menu: toggle auto duplicate guard and open the visit stats panel.
- Pinned favorites, sorting by recent/visits, visit stats, dark mode, live updates.

Privacy & Permissions
- Uses tabs, tabGroups, activeTab, storage; data stays local.

Keywords
tab manager, duplicate cleaner, window save/restore, saved windows, page reminders

中文版（Chinese）

一页看清所有标签，安全清理重复项，并支持保存/重开窗口（保留标签组与置顶）——现在也支持在插件 popup 弹窗里一键保存当前窗口。保存窗口时会自动生成更贴近内容的默认名称，减少命名负担；已保存窗口也支持删除（含二次确认）。设置页面提醒，可写备注，到时间在新标签页提示你回来处理。

核心功能
- 标签总览：一页看清所有标签，按域名或 Chrome 标签组分组。
- 去重清理：一键关闭重复标签；悬停高亮受影响标签，动作更可预期。
- 自动防重复：当你在同一窗口打开已存在的 URL 时，自动切换到已打开的标签，而不是再新开一个。
- 保存与重开窗口：支持在 popup 弹窗或新标签页保存当前窗口，并自动给出智能默认名称（优先基于标签组名，其次基于常见站点），支持预览；一键在新窗口重开，保留原有标签组与置顶标签。不需要时可删除已保存窗口（含二次确认）。
- 页面提醒（新功能）：为任意页面设置提醒并添加备注；到时间会在新标签页以非阻断提示的方式提醒你，可一键打开或稍后提醒。

补充能力
- 设置菜单：开关“自动防重复”功能，并从这里进入访问统计面板。
- 置顶常用、按最近/次数排序、访问统计、暗色主题、实时刷新。

隐私与权限
- 仅用 tabs、tabGroups、activeTab、storage；数据仅保存在本地。

Spotlight Search for Chrome. The ⚡️ Blazing fast ⚡️ search for Bookmarks, History and Special commands.

ZapSearch ⚡️ improves your experience of Chrome browser with the help of Spotlight Search Bar.

🚀 Default Launch Shortcut: "Ctrl + Shift + L" or "Command + Shift + L"

🔥Features:
▶︎ Search Bookmarks
▶︎ Search History
▶︎ Quick Google Search
▶︎ 📍 Ranking based on number of times item searched
▶︎ Commands to Move, Duplicate the Current Tab, Open Settings, Open History, Remove Duplicate Tabs

 ⚙️Troubleshoot 🔴:
If default shortcut does not work, Follow this steps
1. Click ZapSearch icon in tool 
2. Click Change Shortcut button (To Launch Chrome's Extension Shortcut)
3. Find ZapSearch and set "Hot-key" to your favourite Shortcut

A powerful multi-function reloader with keyboard shortcut support.

💻 Chrome Extension: Developer Productivity Enhancer
This extension was developed for Chrome extension developers with the primary goal of boosting workflow efficiency. It provides a functionality to batch-reload extensions installed in Developer Mode and their associated browser tabs, based on user-defined settings.

✨ Key Features and Functionality
This tool automates and streamlines the tedious reloading process in the development workflow through the following core features:

1. Automatic Detection and Listing of Developing Extensions
It automatically detects and displays a list of only the extensions currently under development.

It constantly syncs and updates the extension's name, icon, and enabled/disabled status.

Uninstalled extensions are automatically removed from the list, and newly added extensions are prepended to the top of the list.

2. Flexible Reload Execution
Users can select multiple target extensions from the popup UI and execute a batch-reload instantly.

Individual extensions can also be reloaded using a dedicated button provided for each item in the list.

3. Instant Execution via Shortcut Key
A customizable shortcut key allows for the immediate batch-reloading of extensions based on a previously selected and saved configuration.

4. Simultaneous Tab Reloading (Optional)
As an optional setting, it can execute a browser tab refresh simultaneously with the extension reload.

Users can choose to reload either "Active Tab Only" or "All Tabs" as the target.

5. Additional Utility
The header title provides a direct link to the Chrome Extension Management page (chrome://extensions).

🚀 Benefits for Users
Significantly reduces the number of manual reload operations required during the development cycle.

Shortens the time needed to verify code changes, helping maintain development focus.

Simplifies the switching between target extensions when working on multiple development projects simultaneously.

Bookmark History Manager PRO & share helper

A powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance your browsing experience by providing advanced bookmark and history management capabilities and search, along with innovative sharing features so you can share your bookmarks and history with others and quickly access them via your mobile phone.

Key Features:

1. Advanced Bookmark Management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Intelligent bookmark organization and categorization
- Quick access to frequently visited sites
- Customizable bookmark collections
- Favicon support for visual recognition
- Seamless integration with Chrome's native bookmarking system

2. Enhanced History Management
- Comprehensive browsing history management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Allow adding history items to bookmarks
- Top sites tracking for quick access

3. Smart Link Management & Sharing
- Automatic link description extraction from web pages
- Provide a QR code for each link so you can scan it quickly on your mobile phone
